task:
In the Blender file open at /home/user/Documents/compositor_scene.blend, enable 'Use Nodes' on the scene's Compositor and build this node graph:

Nodes: Render Layers, Blur (type GAUSS, Size X = 10, Size Y = 10), Glare (type FOG_GLOW), Composite, and Viewer.

Links:
- Render Layers Image -> Blur Image
- Blur Image -> Glare Image
- Glare Image -> Composite Image
- Glare Image -> Viewer Image

Save the file.

verification.eval: any(n.get('type')=='BLUR' and n.get('size_x',0)==10 and n.get('size_y',0)==10 for n in result.get('nodes',[]))
any(n.get('type')=='GLARE' and str(n.get('glare_type','')).upper().replace(' ','_')=='FOG_GLOW' for n in result.get('nodes',[]))

any(any(n.get('name')==l['from_node'] and n.get('type')=='GLARE' for n in result.get('nodes',[])) and any(n.get('name')==l['to_node'] and n.get('type')=='COMPOSITE' for n in result.get('nodes',[])) for l in result.get('links',[]))
